title: Fix cost calculations and add usage analysis view

requirements.text: Fix gas and electricity cost calculations so that monthly costs are correctly computed from meter reading deltas multiplied by the applicable per-unit price (gas €/m³, electricity €/kWh) for the selected year. Ensure SummaryOverview KPI cards (gas costs, electricity costs, total energy costs, yearly prognosis) all display correct values.

quotes: De gas en electriciteits kosten worden niet meer berekend. Repareer dit.

acceptanceCriteria: Monthly gas cost = gas consumption delta (m³) × gas price (€/m³) for that year
Monthly electricity cost = electricity consumption delta (kWh) × electricity price (€/kWh) for that year
Per-month price overrides are applied when present, otherwise yearly defaults are used
SummaryOverview correctly shows yearly totals for gas, electricity, and combined costs
Yearly prognosis extrapolates from months with data correctly
CostChart displays correct monthly cost lines for gas, electricity, and other costs

requirements.text: Add a usage analysis view (new tab or section) that shows total energy consumption broken down by: electricity high tariff (kWh), electricity low tariff (kWh), electricity combined total (kWh), and gas (m³). Display both monthly breakdowns and yearly totals for each category.

quotes: Ook wil ik een analyse kunnen zien van het totale gebruik (electra (hoog en laag) en gas, uitgesplitst en totalen hiervan).

acceptanceCriteria: A new 'Analyse' tab or dedicated section is accessible from the main navigation
Electricity high tariff consumption is displayed per month and as a yearly total
Electricity low tariff consumption is displayed per month and as a yearly total
Combined electricity total (high + low) is displayed per month and as a yearly total
Gas consumption is displayed per month and as a yearly total
Data is filtered by the currently selected year
Values are shown with correct units: kWh for electricity, m³ for gas

constraints: Do not change immutable frontend paths (hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, hooks/useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
Preserve existing data schema and user data — only generate migration.mo if the data model must change
nonGoals: Redesigning the existing visual theme or layout beyond adding the new analysis section
Real-time data updates or WebSocket integration
Exporting data to CSV or external formats
